summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SilkZé Kanban production management system iteration 2. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Most frontend functionality working well with one critical login error display issue remaining unfixed.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message NOT displaying for wrong password attempts - data-testid='login-error' element not showing despite API returning 401
Delete confirmation dialog not appearing when delete button is clicked

integration_issues.issue: Pedido sheet modal blocks background interactions (logout button) when open - mentioned as 'by design' but affects UX

passed_tests: Backend: All 10 API endpoints (login, auth, CRUD, search, backup) - 100% success
Frontend: All 12 Kanban columns present including accented ones (Conferência, Expedição)
Frontend: Pedido sheet opens and closes properly
Frontend: All 6 tabs navigation (Info, Orcamento, Grade, Check, Imagem, Layout)
Frontend: Search functionality with client name filtering
Frontend: New pedido creation and form filling
Frontend: Orcamento tab - add items, fill description, quantity, unit price
Frontend: Grade tab - add rows, fill colors and size quantities
Frontend: Checklist functionality - toggle items and progress bar (3/5 display)
Frontend: Logout functionality (when sheet is closed)
Frontend: Sheet close functionality with close button
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix login error message display - the error state is not being set or displayed when wrong password is entered despite API returning 401. The data-testid='login-error' element should show 'Senha incorreta' message. Also fix delete confirmation dialog not appearing.
